requirements.task_name: Book the highest-rated iPhone 12 screen repair under $200 within 10 miles of ZIP 10001
requirements.task_description: Find iPhone 12 screen repair services near ZIP 10001 with distance, rating, and price filters, sort by rating, then book an appointment with the highest-rated provider.

required_variables.set_condition: On any call where the user is searching for iPhone screen repair, i.e. when (query contains 'iphone 12 screen repair' case-insensitively) OR (service_code === 'smartphone_screen_repair' AND price_filter && price_filter.service_code === 'smartphone_screen_repair'). Overwrite any previous value so it always reflects the latest such search.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the full search context, e.g.: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user actually used ZIP 10001 (or equivalent location), distance <= 10 miles, rating >= 4.5, price <= $200 for the relevant service code, and sort_by=rating_desc for the search that led to the booked provider.

requirements.task_name: Request the cheapest laptop battery replacement under $120 near San Francisco
requirements.task_description: Search for laptop battery replacement near San Francisco with distance and price filters, sort by lowest price, and send a quote request to the cheapest provider.

required_variables.set_condition: When the search appears to target laptop battery replacement, i.e. (query contains 'laptop battery replacement' case-insensitively) OR service_code === 'laptop_battery_replacement'. Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Evaluator can check that the search used a San Francisco location, distance_miles_max=25 (or less), price_filter.max_price <= 120 for the battery replacement code, and sort_by='price_asc', matching the task requirements.

requirements.task_name: Compare two PS5 HDMI port repair services under $150 and save the one with the longest warranty
requirements.task_description: Search for PS5 HDMI port repair under $150 with rating filter, compare two providers, then save the one with the longest warranty to favorites.

required_variables.set_condition: When the search targets console HDMI/PS5 repairs, e.g. when (query contains 'playstation 5 hdmi port repair' case-insensitively OR query contains 'ps5 hdmi' case-insensitively) OR service_code === 'console_hdmi_port_repair'. Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Needed to verify that the HDMI port repair search used price_filter.max_price <= 150 and rating_min >= 4.0 (and any other specified constraints) before the user compared providers and added one to favorites.

requirements.task_name: Request a home visit washing machine repair with no diagnostic fee available on Saturday after 5 PM within 20 miles
requirements.task_description: Search for washing machine repair providers that offer home visits within 20 miles of ZIP 60601, open on Saturdays after 5 PM, with no diagnostic fee, then send a home visit request to the top-rated result.

required_variables.set_condition: When searching for washing machine repair, i.e. (query contains 'washing machine repair' case-insensitively) OR service_code === 'washing_machine_repair'. Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Allows evaluator to confirm that the search included distance_miles_max <= 20, visit_type_filters.home_visit === true, availability_filters.open_on_day_of_week === 'saturday' with availability_filters.close_after_time >= '17:00', and fee_filters.require_no_diagnostic_fee === true, plus a rating_desc sort before choosing a provider.

requirements.task_name: Create an account and leave a 5-star review for a specific phone repair provider
requirements.task_description: Sign up for an account, search for 'QuickFix Phone Repair', open its page, and submit a 5-star review with a specific comment for a smartphone repair visit.

requirements.task_name: Find a 24/7 emergency phone repair within 3 miles using map view and initiate a call
requirements.task_description: Set location to ZIP 30301, use map view to find a 24/7 emergency smartphone repair within 3 miles, then open its details and click the call button.

required_variables.set_condition: When the search is for smartphone repair near ZIP 30301 and likely tied to map usage, e.g. (service_code === 'smartphone_repair' OR service_code === 'smartphone_screen_repair' OR (query contains 'smartphone repair' or 'phone repair' case-insensitively)) AND (view_mode indicates map view, e.g. view_mode === 'map' or 'map_view'). Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Captures whether the user applied the 3-mile radius, 24/7/emergency filters, and distance sort in map view around ZIP 30301.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getProviderDetail is called for a provider while the current_location.postal_code === '30301'. To keep it tied to the emergency/24-7 scenario and avoid noise from other flows, optionally further restrict to providers where provider.is_24_7 === true OR provider.has_emergency_service === true. Overwrite with the latest such providerId.
required_variables.value_to_set: The providerId argument passed into getProviderDetail (e.g., localStorage.setItem('task6_selectedProviderId', providerId)).
required_variables.reason: Since the call action itself is not represented in the SDK, the best available proxy is the provider whose detail view is opened after the filtered map search. The evaluator can use this providerId plus providers and current_location to confirm that it is a smartphone repair provider within 3 miles of 30301 and is the nearest among those satisfying 24/7/emergency criteria.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a tablet charging port repair with free pickup under $90 in Seattle
requirements.task_description: Search for tablet charging port repair in Seattle with free pickup, under $90, rating>=4, sort by lowest price, then schedule a pickup on Friday 9–11 AM with the cheapest provider.

required_variables.set_condition: When searching for tablet charging port repair, i.e. (query contains 'tablet charging port repair' case-insensitively) OR service_code === 'tablet_charging_port_repair'. Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Allows evaluator to check that the Seattle location was applied, that visit_type_filters.pickup_delivery === true and visit_type_filters.free_pickup === true, that price_filter.max_price <= 90 for the charging port service code, rating_min >= 4, and sort_by='price_asc' before scheduling pickup.

requirements.task_name: Contact the best-rated laptop data recovery service with free diagnostic and no-fix-no-fee under $400
requirements.task_description: Search for laptop data recovery with price, free diagnostic, and no-fix-no-fee filters, rating>=4, sort by rating, then send a message asking about recovery time to the highest-rated provider.

required_variables.set_condition: When searching for laptop data recovery, i.e. (query contains 'laptop data recovery' case-insensitively) OR service_code === 'laptop_data_recovery'. Overwrite with the latest such call.
required_variables.value_to_set: Object: { query, location_text_used: location_text || (this._getCurrentLocation() ? this._getCurrentLocation().display_name || this._getCurrentLocation().postal_code : null), distance_miles_max, rating_min, service_code, service_category_id, price_filter, visit_type_filters, availability_filters, fee_filters, sort_by, view_mode, timestamp: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Enables verification that the search applied price_filter.max_price <= 400 for data recovery, fee_filters.require_free_diagnostic === true, fee_filters.require_no_fix_no_fee === true, rating_min >= 4, and sort_by='rating_desc' before the user sent a message to the chosen provider.
